programs.title: House Hunters
programs.desc: A couple is relocating to Los Angeles, and she has a serious case of sticker shock; he wants something with modern touches that's move-in ready, while she wants four bedrooms and doesn't mind renovations to save money.

programs.title: House Hunters
programs.desc: A Los Angeles couple spends their entire married lives in a very walkable West Hollywood; they look for something with more space, but finding an affordable place where they don't have to drive is a challenge.

programs.title: House Hunters
programs.desc: A husband has convinced his wife to move from sunny Los Angeles to his snowy home state of Minnesota in search of affordable housing.

programs.title: House Hunters
programs.desc: New Jersey residents head to Amelia Island, Fla., in search of their dream vacation home; she's looking for a house with a beachy vibe that's close to the ocean, while he wants something farther inland that's more traditional.

programs.title: House Hunters
programs.sub_title: Hunting for a Cabin in Broken Bow
programs.desc: A young Texas couple with a new baby want to buy a vacation cabin in nearby Broken Bow, Okla.; he wants lots of room for friends and family to stay, but she'd prefer a one-bedroom place perfect for romantic getaways.

programs.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programs.desc: A woman wants to find a beachfront home on Amelia Island, Fla., and her son and daughter-in-law help her with the task.
